summary: Polish/refinement iteration testing for CompileRenderPage. All 15 acceptance criteria verified. All pass except badge shows raw snake_case (known LOW issue from iteration 1).

ui_bugs.issue: Badge still shows raw 'intake_needs_review' (snake_case) instead of human-readable 'Intake Needs Review'

action_items: Optional: Format badge label from 'intake_needs_review' → 'Intake Needs Review' for better UX
passed_tests: Stage heading 'Compile / Render' visible with inline badge (flex items-center gap-2.5)
Blocker card 'CURRENT BLOCKER' eyebrow label present
'Prepare is blocked' as dominant heading in blocker card
'Approve Intake before compile can run.' message present
'Return to Intake Review' button with arrow icon clickable
Pipeline Compile packet: amber AlertCircle + 'Blocked' badge + helper text 'Compile becomes available after Intake approval.'
Pipeline waiting steps (Packet validation, Render executor brief, Brief validation, Approval): only muted icon + label, NO badge pills visible
Pipeline Repair step: shows Minus icon and 'n/a' indicator, no badge
Generated Artifacts: compact horizontal row with 'No prepare artifacts generated yet.' and subtext about compile output
Inspector panel has 4 tabs: DETAILS, ARTIFACTS, VALIDATION, LOGS
DETAILS tab has all 5 section headers: RUN STATE, COMPILED PACKET, REPAIR, EXECUTOR BRIEF, APPROVAL
ARTIFACTS tab shows 'No artifacts generated yet.'
VALIDATION tab shows 'No validation data available. Compile must run first.'
LOGS tab shows 'No logs available yet.'
Pipeline container has no outer border box

notes.false_positive_clarification: 'Waiting on...' text IS present on page but only in Inspector DETAILS values (e.g. 'Waiting on compile' as a data field value), NOT as pipeline badge pills. Pipeline waiting steps are correctly clean.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All polish requirements from iteration 2 pass. Component: CompileRenderPage.js. Only known issue: badge raw snake_case label (LOW). All layout, hierarchy, inspector sections, pipeline steps, blocker card eyebrow all working correctly.
